- Iran 7th+ missile wave ongoing — intensifying despite 'functional defeat' of production
- Netanyahu explicit regime topple rhetoric — no diplomatic off-ramp
- Israel healthcare strikes + Gaza threats over Beirut
- DPRK fires 10-missile salvo during US-SK drills — 3rd launch this year, trend rising
- Pakistan strikes Afghan base after Zardari 'red line' — fighting intensifies despite China mediation

SEVEN IMMINENT. ONE CRITICAL. ONE ELEVATED. GLOBAL WAR PROBABILITY 85% IMMINENT.

latest_news.headline: DPRK fires ~10 ballistic missiles during US-South Korea Freedom Shield exercises
latest_news.text: North Korea fires approximately 10 SRBMs from Sunan area, 340km range into Sea of Japan. Third missile test this year. Kim Yo Jong condemns 'destroying stability' of Korean Peninsula. Cruise missiles also tested from destroyer Choe Hyon earlier in week.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan strikes Afghan military base after Zardari says Taliban 'crossed a red line'
latest_news.text: Pakistan strikes Afghan base following President Zardari's warning that Taliban drone attacks on Pakistani civilians 'crossed a red line.' Taliban denies targeting civilians. Multiple drone incursions reported. China mediation continues.

latest_news.headline: Iran fires 7th ballistic missile wave at Israel since midnight
latest_news.text: No injuries reported in Iran's 7th ballistic missile attack on Israel. Sirens sounded in localities that had not received early warning alerts.

latest_news.headline: Hegseth: US/Israel 'functionally defeated' Iran's ballistic missile production
latest_news.text: US Defense Secretary says combined strikes have 'functionally defeated' Iran's missile production. Netanyahu states Israel 'creating optimal conditions for toppling the regime.'

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes healthcare center in southern Lebanon — 12 medics killed
latest_news.text: Israeli strike on healthcare center in Burj Qalawiya kills 12 doctors, paramedics and nurses.

latest_news.headline: Erdogan vows Turkey won't be dragged into Iran war after 3+ missile intercepts
latest_news.text: Third Iranian ballistic missile intercepted by NATO over Turkish territory. Turkey reserves right to self-defense. Erdogan: 'Turkey will not be drawn into conflict.' NATO Patriot deployed to Kürecik radar base.

latest_news.headline: Hezbollah fires suicide drones at Israeli troops in Ya'ara inside Israel
latest_news.text: Hezbollah claims suicide drones hit Israeli troops in Ya'ara inside Israel. IDF strikes on southern Lebanon, Beirut and Beqaa Valley continue.

latest_news.headline: Israel drops flyers over Beirut threatening Gaza-scale destruction
latest_news.text: Israeli aircraft dropped flyers over Beirut threatening damage similar to Gaza. Second such flyer drop.

outlook:
CRITICAL IMMINENT — Global war probability 85% IMMINENT (Day 16 11:04). MULTI-FRONT ESCALATION:

(1) IRAN → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): 7th+ missile wave at Israel. Netanyahu explicit regime-change rhetoric. 7,600+ strikes. US claims 'functional defeat' of Iran's missile production — but Iran keeps firing.

(2) ISRAEL-LEBANON → IMMINENT 94 (RISING): 12 medics killed in healthcare strike. Gaza-scale destruction threatened via flyers over Beirut. Hezbollah drones hit inside Israel. Diplomatic track stalled.

(3) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN → IMMINENT 99 (capped, RISING): Zardari 'red line' — Pakistan strikes Afghan base. Taliban drone attacks on Pakistani civilians. China mediation active but fighting intensifies.

(4) RUSSIA-UKRAINE → IMMINENT 82 (stable).

(5) RUSSIA → IMMINENT 77 (stable).

(6) TURKEY → IMMINENT 78: 3+ Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish territory. Erdogan vows not to be drawn in. NATO Patriot deployed.

(7) DPRK → CRITICAL 47 (RISING): 10-missile salvo during Freedom Shield — 3rd launch this year. Kim Yo Jong condemns exercises.

SEVEN IMMINENT, ONE CRITICAL, ONE ELEVATED. COALITION COHESION DEGRADING (Kuwait friendly fire). NO DIPLOMATIC OFF-RAMPS ON ANY FRONT.
